{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Estyr's restraints
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] is strapped to a bed with thick restraints designed to hold bears.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
